title: Quantum Lab
description: From-scratch quantum lab in TypeScript with FIVE simulation engines: state-vector, density-matrix, stabilizer-tableau (Clifford circuits to 30 qubits), a Matrix Product State tensor network with a from-scratch complex SVD, and an exact free-fermion (Jordan–Wigner + Bogoliubov) solver for the transverse-field Ising chain — running arbitrary circuits on 40 qubits in O(n·χ²) memory with error-tracked bond truncation, perfect sampling and per-cut entanglement entropy. On top of the tensor network: TEBD real-time dynamics of the Ising chain (quench light-cone, matched to exact), and full two-site DMRG — Matrix Product Operators + incremental environments + a matrix-free Lanczos eigensolver finding the ground state of the Ising and Heisenberg/XXZ chains, matching exact diagonalisation to ~1e-13 with a vanishing ⟨H²⟩−⟨H⟩² eigenstate certificate at lengths far past exact diag, plus a phase-transition scan that locates quantum critical points from the ground-state entanglement peak. And now TOPOLOGICAL ERROR CORRECTION: the rotated surface code [[d²,1,d]] with a real Minimum-Weight Perfect Matching decoder — a faithful from-scratch implementation of Edmonds' blossom algorithm (Galil's O(V³) primal-dual matching, verified against brute force) running on a graph of lit-up parity checks weighted by lattice distance. Inject X/Z errors on an interactive lattice and watch the checks fire, the matching form, and the residual be classified as a stabilizer or a logical failure; a Monte-Carlo sweep reproduces the ≈10.3% error-correction threshold where the distance-3/5/7 curves cross. And now FAULT TOLERANCE IN SPACE-TIME: a phenomenological noise model with T repeated noisy syndrome rounds decoded on a 3-D space-time matching graph (time edges absorb measurement errors), a from-scratch Union-Find decoder (Delfosse–Nivelle: near-linear cluster growth + peeling, cross-checked against MWPM), the phenomenological threshold (~3%), and finite-size scaling — the Λ = p_L(d)/p_L(d+2) suppression factor plus a universal data collapse that fits (p_th, ν). And now AN EXACT FREE-FERMION ENGINE: the transverse-field Ising chain is secretly free, so the Jordan–Wigner transform + a Bogoliubov–de Gennes diagonalisation (which is literally a singular-value decomposition of an n×n matrix, reusing the same from-scratch complex SVD) solve it EXACTLY in O(n³) at hundreds of sites the 2ⁿ vector cannot hold and DMRG only approximates — an exact oracle that reproduces the lab's own TFIM ground energy from exact diagonalisation to machine precision and then runs far past it. It gives the Bogoliubov spectrum and ground energy E₀=−½ΣΛ_k, the quasiparticle gap 2|J−h| closing at the quantum critical point h=J, block entanglement from the ground state's MAJORANA COVARIANCE matrix (Peschel) that recovers the Ising-CFT central charge c=½ via a Calabrese–Cardy fit, a ground energy per site matching the closed-form Pfeuty thermodynamic integral, and an exact real-time QUENCH whose Gaussian correlation matrices evolve in O(n³) per step — reproducing the entanglement light-cone at sizes whose Schmidt rank 2^S no MPS or exact simulator could store, every small-n step cross-checked against exact dense evolution. Also: Kraus noise, a complex Hermitian eigensolver, Bloch spheres, Schmidt decomposition, error-correcting codes (bit/phase-flip, 9-qubit Shor, Steane [[7,1,3]] with live syndrome decoding), phase estimation, VQE with analytic parameter-shift gradients & QAOA, randomized benchmarking, OpenQASM export, and a 75-case self-test suite cross-checking every engine against exact references.
